name: Planning as Emergent Behavior in Reinforcement Learning with Relational Hidden States

description: arXiv:2607.18589v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning is conventionally divided into model-based and model-free methods. In this taxonomy, model-based methods perform lookahead planning over a learned world model, whereas model-free methods learn a reactive state-action mapping. Recent work, however, has shown that planning can emerge from model-free reinforcement learning al...
author: Armin Sommer
